metadata.name: Verify a Viral Social Media Video

description: A dramatic video of an event is going viral. A reporter must verify its authenticity before reporting on it.

nodes.task_description: Perform a reverse image search on keyframes from the video to see where it first appeared online.

expected_outcome.value: Agent traces the video back to its original poster.

nodes.task_description: Analyze the video's metadata for clues about the date and time it was created.

expected_outcome.value: Agent extracts and analyzes the video's metadata.

nodes.task_description: Use landmarks, weather, and shadows in the video to geolocate it and confirm it matches the claimed location and time.

expected_outcome.value: Agent corroborates the video's context using external information.

nodes.task_description: Attempt to contact the original poster to ask for more information.

expected_outcome.value: Agent reaches out to the source for direct confirmation.
